name: Pane Frattau
recipeInstructions:
1. Place 4 leaves of bread on 4 large platters.
2. Pour 1/2 cup hot water over each leaf and allow to soak for 3 to 4 minutes, until soft and pliable.
3. In a nonstick pan over medium heat, add olive oil when smoking.
4. Crack 4 eggs into the pan, keeping them separated.
5. Fry the eggs sunny side up for 1 to 2 minutes.
6. Spoon hot tomato sauce over the soaked bread and transfer to smaller plates, folding the bread to fit on each plate.
7. Place 1 egg on each piece of bread, sprinkle with grated pecorino sardo, and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
